Accessibility statement

We aim to meet WCAG 2.2 at level AA across the Confab site. The looping home-page demo is decorative, marked up as a single image with a text alternative, and stops on a still frame under reduced-motion. The substance of the page is in plain text.

Home Why a room License

Where we stand

  • Target: WCAG 2.2 AA for the whole site.
  • The product preview is decorative, announced once as an image, and never read out as streaming captions.
  • Keyboard operable, visible focus rings, focus-trapped dialogs, system light/dark, reduced-motion fallback.
  • Known limit: the preview leans on motion and colour. We keep the real content in text. Report problems to asaf@logicaleap.com.
